programs.title: Wheel of Fortune Celebrity Special
programs.desc: Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.

programs.title: The 1% Club
programs.desc: Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.

programs.title: Hell's Kitchen
programs.desc: US cooking competition. Chef Ramsay surprises the final three with emotional visits from their families before one of the most high-stakes challenges yet.

programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. Meg enlists in a training programme for a mission to Mars when she gets fed up with feeling like she doesn't belong after a Dua Lipa concert.

programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. When Peter protests about Brad Pitt being cast in a biopic about a politician, he ends up in the lead role when the star gets injured on set.

programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. When Meg finds that her tears make cookies delicious, she starts a business based on the discovery with Brian, Stewie and Chris as her backers.
